children.heading: Effect on Federal and State laws
children.label: a Effect on Federal and State laws
children.text: This chapter does not affect the application of any other Federal or State law, statutory or common, including the Marine Protection, Research, and Sanctuaries Act of 1972 [ et seq., 1447 et seq.; et seq., 2801 et seq.] and the Solid Waste Disposal Act ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 143133 U.S.C. 140142 U.S.C. 6901

children.heading: Effect on foreign vessels
children.label: b Effect on foreign vessels
children.text: This chapter shall be carried out with respect to foreign vessels consistent with the obligations of the United States under international law.
